title: Better Ancient Debris
description: Replaces the default ancient debris texture with that of surprised Pikachu, because that is exactly how you look when you find ancient debris.
body:
![Title For "Better Ancient Debris"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/996dc7e8c4795ca67259ed3cebeaa699d400cf2a.png)



This is a little resource pack I made for myself a few years ago, mainly to help with ancient debris visiblity. I have unfortunately since lost that original pack, but I've decided to recreate the pack with some minor changes (basically just the block texture, but also the netherite scrap texture) and upload it to Modrinth.

The pack took me like 15 minutes to throw together, so it's not gonna be award worthy or anything, but it's still a nice little pack to have enabled :)
#
![The Text "Pack Options!" on a red background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/082b76ea20dff31bf5e366190078f9ec1185a83e.png)

I know some people may not like the netherite scrap texture due to it techniclly being high-res, so there are two download options, one titled "Standard Version" and one titled "No Scrap Version", so see which one you prefer! (I actually prefer the scrapless version)
#
### Potential Updates
- Finding a less visually odd alternative to the netherite scrap texture.
- Revamping the resource pack to contain mulitple meme characters and randomly generate, and thus renaming the pack to "Meme Ancient Debris"
#
![The ancient debris and netherite scrap as seen ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4ab01f814e7f48d6d1c6961104fea4a71d77c2c_0.webp)
